message:
Implement user appeals system for moderation

- Appeal form and status components
- Admin appeals management pages
- Public and API endpoints for submitting/viewing appeals
- Appeal store for state management
- Enhanced suspended page with appeal option
- Enforcement service integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch: @@ -135,7 +135,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9r7s","title":"Add --json flag support for all new CLI commands","description":"Add --json flag support to all new CLI commands for machine-readable output. Commands to Update: - jfp login (output: { authenticated: true, email, tier }) - jfp logout (output: { logged_out: true }) - jfp whoami (output: { email, tier, user_id }) - jfp collections list (output: { collections: [...] }) - jfp collections show (output: { collection, items: [...] }) - jfp notes (output: { prompt_id, notes: [...] }) - jfp save (output: { saved: true, prompt_id }) - jfp list --mine/--saved (output: { prompts: [...] }) Implementation: - Add --json/-j flag to all relevant commands - When --json is set, output only valid JSON to stdout - Errors should also be JSON: { error: true, message, code } - Progress/status messages go to stderr when --json is enabled - Ensure consistent field naming across all commands ","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:23:15.385023105Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:20:01.044458985Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T02:20:01.044458985Z","close_reason":"All CLI commands now have --json flag support with consistent output format","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9r7s","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9g76","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:19.154441027Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9r7s","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-cgj5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T01:25:08.868781233Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9rgl","title":"Redesign 'Clear All Filters' as a proper button","description":"# Task: Redesign Clear Filters Button ## Current Implementation (page.tsx:165-172) ```tsx {hasActiveFilters && ( )} ``` ## Problems 1. Plain text link - low visual prominence 2. Uses indigo (inconsistent with neutral design system) 3. Only visible when filters active (no affordance) 4. No icon - relies entirely on text ## Proposed Design ### Option A: Always-visible ghost button (Recommended) ```tsx ``` ### Option B: Only when active, but as a proper button ```tsx {hasActiveFilters && ( )} ``` ## Implementation Details ### Add filter count calculation ```tsx const filterCount = useMemo(() => { let count = 0; if (filters.query) count++; if (filters.category) count++; count += filters.tags.length; return count; }, [filters]); ``` ### Add accessibility ```tsx aria-label={`Clear all ${filterCount} active filters`} ``` ## Design Rationale - Ghost button maintains visual hierarchy (filters are secondary to results) - Always visible = discoverable (disabled state indicates "nothing to clear") - Icon + text = clear meaning - Count badge = precise feedback - Matches CategoryFilter/TagFilter clear button pattern ## Testing 1. With no filters: button disabled, grayed out 2. With 1 filter: button enabled, shows "(1)" 3. With multiple: button shows count 4. Click clears all and disables button 5. Keyboard accessible (Tab, Enter) ## Files Modified - apps/web/src/app/page.tsx ## Dependencies - Should use the updated neutral color palette (do after color fix) - Matches pattern already used in TagFilter.tsx (Clear button)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-12T05:38:18.479565228Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-12T15:06:14.296451909Z","closed_at":"2026-01-12T15:06:14.296451909Z","close_reason":"Implementation verified complete: Button component with ghost variant, X icon, filterCount memo, aria-label, and neutral colors. Build passes.","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9rgl","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-ogel","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-12T05:43:15.125413399Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","title":"Feature: GitHub Actions E2E Integration","description":"Add E2E tests to GitHub Actions CI workflow. Configure CLI E2E tests to run on push/PR. Configure Playwright for web E2E with proper browser setup. Upload test artifacts (screenshots, videos, logs) on failure. Optional: multi-browser test matrix for comprehensive coverage.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:43:26.454174609Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T00:16:26.265863560Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T00:16:26.265863560Z","close_reason":"CI infrastructure implemented in parent EPIC","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-945","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:53:36.860791733Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-jxd","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:53:26.008125350Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9sj","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-nfm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:53:59.405040418Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]} -{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9","title":"EPIC: Ratings & Reviews System","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-cdp. ## Overview Ratings and reviews provide quality signals for community content, helping users discover the best prompts, packs, and skills while rewarding creators for quality contributions. ## Rating System Design ### Simple Rating (MVP) - Thumbs up / thumbs down (binary) - Easy, low-friction interaction - Clear positive/negative signal - Calculate "approval rate" percentage ### Extended Rating (V2) - 1-5 star rating - Written review (optional) - Helpful/not helpful on reviews - Response from author ## Key Features ### Rate Content - One-click rating on any ratable content - Rate: prompts, packs, skills - Change rating anytime - See your rating history ### View Ratings - Show rating on content cards - Rating breakdown on detail pages - Sort by rating in lists - Filter by minimum rating ### Reviews (V2) - Write text review with rating - Edit/delete own reviews - Report inappropriate reviews - Author can respond to reviews ### Leaderboards - Top rated prompts this week/month - Top contributors by ratings received - Rising stars (new content with high ratings) ## Anti-Gaming Measures - One rating per user per item - Rate limiting on rapid ratings - Flag suspicious patterns - Weight by user reputation ## Database Schema - ratings (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_value, created_at, updated_at) - reviews (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_id, content, created_at) - review_votes (review_id, user_id, is_helpful) ## UI Components - RatingButton (thumbs up/down) - RatingDisplay (show current rating) - RatingBreakdown (detailed stats) - ReviewList (paginated reviews) - ReviewForm (write review) ## Integration Points - Community prompts (Swap Meet) - Prompt packs - Skills - Collections (V2) ","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-11T06:20:02.532432863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T06:20:02.532432863Z","compaction_level":0} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9wk9","title":"EPIC: Ratings & Reviews System","description":"## Origin Moved from jeffreysprompts_premium jeffreysprompts_premium-cdp. ## Overview Ratings and reviews provide quality signals for community content, helping users discover the best prompts, packs, and skills while rewarding creators for quality contributions. ## Rating System Design ### Simple Rating (MVP) - Thumbs up / thumbs down (binary) - Easy, low-friction interaction - Clear positive/negative signal - Calculate "approval rate" percentage ### Extended Rating (V2) - 1-5 star rating - Written review (optional) - Helpful/not helpful on reviews - Response from author ## Key Features ### Rate Content - One-click rating on any ratable content - Rate: prompts, packs, skills - Change rating anytime - See your rating history ### View Ratings - Show rating on content cards - Rating breakdown on detail pages - Sort by rating in lists - Filter by minimum rating ### Reviews (V2) - Write text review with rating - Edit/delete own reviews - Report inappropriate reviews - Author can respond to reviews ### Leaderboards - Top rated prompts this week/month - Top contributors by ratings received - Rising stars (new content with high ratings) ## Anti-Gaming Measures - One rating per user per item - Rate limiting on rapid ratings - Flag suspicious patterns - Weight by user reputation ## Database Schema - ratings (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_value, created_at, updated_at) - reviews (id, user_id, content_type, content_id, rating_id, content, created_at) - review_votes (review_id, user_id, is_helpful) ## UI Components - RatingButton (thumbs up/down) - RatingDisplay (show current rating) - RatingBreakdown (detailed stats) - ReviewList (paginated reviews) - ReviewForm (write review) ## Integration Points - Community prompts (Swap Meet) - Prompt packs - Skills - Collections (V2) ","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"epic","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-11T06:20:02.532432863Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-21T07:32:01.211232245Z","compaction_level":0} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9wpw","title":"Fix useLocalStorage null persistence","description":"useLocalStorage skipped persisting null values because null used as sentinel; track latest value with a separate flag","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-10T22:55:53.211070932Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T22:56:21.167849624Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T22:56:21.167849624Z","close_reason":"Track latest value with flag so null can persist safely","compaction_level":0} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9","title":"Implement jfp open, categories, tags, doctor, about -- Details: open launches browser to permalink. categories/tags list with counts. doctor checks environment (cache, skills dirs). about shows ecosystem info + ASCII banner.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-10T05:27:23.461876267Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T07:37:37.501389089Z","closed_at":"2026-01-10T07:37:37.501389089Z","close_reason":"Commands already implemented: open, categories, tags, doctor, about. All support --json output.","compaction_level":0,"labels":["status:in_progress"]} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9.1","title":"State change: status → in_progress","description":"Set status to in_progress","status":"closed","priority":4,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","created_at":"2026-01-10T07:36:05.003876937Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:37.411945766Z","closed_at":"2026-01-11T02:23:37.411945766Z","close_reason":"Acknowledged state change - parent bead completed","compaction_level":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9.1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-9x9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-10T07:36:05.005026843Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"","thread_id":""}]}

@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@ +import type { Metadata } from "next"; +import Link from "next/link"; +import { ArrowLeft, AlertTriangle } from "lucide-react"; +import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; +import { Card, CardContent } from "@/components/ui/card"; +import { AppealStatus } from "@/components/moderation/appeal-status"; +import { getAppeal } from "@/lib/moderation/appeal-store"; +import { + getModerationAction, + getModerationReasonLabel, + getActionTypeLabel, +} from "@/lib/moderation/action-store"; + +export const metadata: Metadata = { + title: "Appeal Status | JeffreysPrompts", + description: "Check the status of your moderation appeal.", +}; + +interface AppealStatusPageProps { + params: Promise<{ id: string }>; + searchParams: Promise<{ email?: string }>; +} + +export default async function AppealStatusPage({ + params, + searchParams, +}: AppealStatusPageProps) { + const { id } = await params; + const { email } = await searchParams; + + // Validate email parameter + if (!email) { + return ( +
+ + + +

Email Required

+

+ To view your appeal status, please use the link from your confirmation email + or provide your email address. +

+ + + +
+ ); + } + + // Get the appeal + const appeal = getAppeal(id); + + if (!appeal) { + return ( +
+ + + +

Appeal Not Found

+

+ The appeal you are looking for could not be found. Please check the link + and try again. +

+ + + +
+ ); + } + + // Verify the email matches + if (appeal.userEmail !== email.toLowerCase()) { + return ( +
+ + + +

Access Denied

+

+ You do not have permission to view this appeal. +

+ + + +
+ ); + } + + // Get the associated action + const action = getModerationAction(appeal.actionId); + const actionData = action + ? { + actionType: getActionTypeLabel(action.actionType), + reason: getModerationReasonLabel(action.reason), + details: action.details, + createdAt: action.createdAt, + } + : null; + + return ( +
+
+ +

Appeal Status

+

+ Appeal ID: {appeal.id.slice(0, 8)}... +

+
+ + +
+ ); +}

@@ -0,0 +1,123 @@ +import type { Metadata } from "next"; +import Link from "next/link"; +import { FileText, AlertTriangle, ArrowRight } from "lucide-react"; +import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; +import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card"; + +export const metadata: Metadata = { + title: "Moderation Appeals | JeffreysPrompts", + description: "Submit or check the status of a moderation appeal.", +}; + +interface AppealsPageProps { + searchParams: Promise<{ + actionId?: string; + userId?: string; + email?: string; + }>; +} + +export default async function AppealsPage({ searchParams }: AppealsPageProps) { + const params = await searchParams; + const { actionId, userId, email } = params; + + // If we have an actionId, redirect to the new appeal form + if (actionId && userId && email) { + return ( +
+ + + + + Submit Appeal + + + +

+ You are about to submit an appeal for a moderation action. +

+ + + +
+ ); + } + + return ( +
+
+

Moderation Appeals

+

+ If you believe a moderation action was taken in error, you can submit an appeal for review. +

+
+ +
+ {/* Check existing appeal */} + + + + + Check Appeal Status + + + +

+ If you have already submitted an appeal, you can check its status using the link + provided in your confirmation email. +

+

+ Appeals are typically reviewed within 14 days. You will receive an email notification + when a decision is made. +

+ + + + {/* New appeal info */} + + + + + Submit a New Appeal + + + +

+ To submit a new appeal, you must access this page from your suspension notice. + Appeals can only be submitted within 7 days of the moderation action. +

+
+

Appeal Guidelines:

+
    +
  • • You can only submit one appeal per moderation action
    • +
  • • Appeals must be submitted within 7 days
    • +
  • • Be honest and provide relevant context in your explanation
    • +
  • • Decisions are typically made within 14 days
    • +
+
+ + + + {/* Contact support */} + + +

+ If you have questions about moderation or appeals, please{" "} + + contact our support team + + . +

+ + +
+
+ ); +}
